result.status_detail: W5.0 regression OK: PII (RRN) blocked while logged in; red/warning message rendered in chat (contains '차단'). Matches logged-in baseline PASS_BLOCKED. No regression.
result.warning_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: grok W5.0 regression. Method: GUI (windows-mcp). DEFAULT logged-in Chrome used. Opened grok.com in new tab, hard reload (ctrl+shift+r). Confirmed logged-in: account 'plantynetaitest@gmail.com' visible in sidebar, no login prompt. Clicked '새 채팅', set clipboard to '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567', input auto-focused, pasted via Ctrl+V, submitted via 제출 button. Waited 60s. Snapshot verified: user bubble sent, then warning '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' rendered above a 'Grok이 응답을 완료하지 못했습니다 / 재시도' error block (no model response generated). URL rewritten to APF warn rid (00000000-apf0-warn-0000-000000000002). Warning rendering unaffected by W5.0. PASS_BLOCKED, matches logged-in baseline.
